name: North India Grand Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Varanasi, Khajuraho with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival transfer at Delhi airport/railway station & a guided tour to proc
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival transfer at Delhi airport/railway station & a guided tour to proceed to visit Qutub minar, India gate, Red fort, Jama masjid. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jaipur (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Jaipur (260 Kms. 6 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, After breakfast, I took a guided tour to visit the magnificent Amber Fort
itinerary.description: Today, After breakfast, I took a guided tour to visit the magnificent Amber Fort, Water palace, City palace, Hawa mahal (Window palace). Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms. 7 Hrs.): After breakfast proceed to Jaipur - En-Route stop to visit Fatehpur Sikri. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, After breakfast, a guided tour to visit The Taj Mahal, Agra fort, Marble
itinerary.description: Today, After breakfast, a guided tour to visit The Taj Mahal, Agra fort, Marble inlay handicrafts. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Khajuraho (415 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Khajuraho (415 Kms. 8 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Khajuraho.En route visit Orchha. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho Sightseeing: After breakfast proceed to visit of Western Temples, Jain
itinerary.description: Khajuraho Sightseeing: After breakfast proceed to visit of Western Temples, Jain Temples.  Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho to Varanasi (400 Kms
itinerary.description: Khajuraho to Varanasi (400 Kms. 9/10 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Varanasi. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Early morning a guided tour proceeds by boat ride on Hindu Holy River Ganges, af
itinerary.description: Early morning a guided tour proceeds by boat ride on Hindu Holy River Ganges, after refresh & breakfast proceed to visit Sankat mochan temple, Vishwanath temple, Bharat mata mandir. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Varanasi drop: After breakfast proceed to Varanasi airport/Railway Stn
itinerary.description:
Varanasi drop: After breakfast proceed to Varanasi airport/Railway Stn.
Please note: Taj Mahal Closed on every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

itinerary.description: Jaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar), famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done for centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Jaipur – Agra VIA Fatehpur Sikri(260 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Jaipur on the way to visit Fatehpur Sikri. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Agra sightseeing: Today, a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort , and visiting famous fine marble inlay work which is still being done in Agra. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Khajuraho (400 kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Khajuraho (400 kms. 8 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Khajuraho. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Khajuraho Sightseeing: After breakfast, proceed to visit the most famous Western Temple’s, Jain Temple, and city centre walk, Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Khajuraho to Varanasi (400 kms. 9 hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Varanasi & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Varanasi sightseeing: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to see the famous bathing Ghats site. After breakfast, visit Vishwanath temple, Sankat mochan temple, BHEU & Sarnath. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: Delhi – Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel.Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Delhi – Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Rajghat (Gandhi Cremation place),India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb,Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Agra – Today after breakfast proceed to Agra and Visit Memory of Love Taj Mahal (First wonder of the world) After visit Agra Fort. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Ranthambore – Jaipur, Today early morning proceed to Jungle Safari(Own Arrangement) . After breakfast proceed to Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Today after breakfast proceed to visit ancient capital of Amber
itinerary.description: Jaipur – Today after breakfast proceed to visit ancient capital of Amber. Visit beautiful Amber Fort after Amber Fort proceed to the pink city Jaipur we will visit Hawa Mahal(Window Palace), City Place and Observatory(Jantar Mantar) after visit famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done since centuries in Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Pushkar, Today after breakfast proceed to Pushkar Hindu Holly City afte
itinerary.description: Jaipur – Pushkar, Today after breakfast proceed to Pushkar Hindu Holly City after check in at hotel visit Brahma Temple, Camel Fare Ground . Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Pushkar – Jaisalmer, Today after breakfast proceed to Jaisalmer. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Jaisalmer – Today after breakfast check out from hotel and visit Jaisalmer Fort, Ludarwa Jain Temple after lunch proceed to Khuri(Desert Village) and enjoy village & sand dunes sun set point by camel ride & back to desert camp, enjoy Rajasthani Folk Dance,Dinner. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Jaisalmer – Bikaner, Today after breakfast proceed to Bikaner after check in at hotel evening proceed to world famous Deshnok Temple. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.description: Bikaner – Mandawa, Today after breakfast visit Bikaner Fort(Junagarh Fort) & after proceed to Mandawa. Evening free for walking tour to visit old painted Houses (Havelis). Rest of the day at leisure.
